title: Abbreviations — Expand or Keep for the Dental Reader
brief: For each abbreviation, decide whether you should KEEP it (the reader will recognise it) or EXPAND it (the reader is non-specialist or lay).

items.context: Writing to an oral and maxillofacial surgeon
items.rationale: Standard radiograph terminology between dental specialists.

items.context: Writing a periodontal referral to a general practitioner
items.rationale: Outside dentistry the abbreviation is rarely understood.
Patients should see the full procedure name.
